tasks.title: Main verification readiness panel
acceptance: 用户知道是否可以进入 main verification。
Workbench shows reviewer.approved, branch/main state, ff-only merge guidance, required verification commands, and the evidence path before main verification.

The main Workbench path follows goal-status -> goal next -> goal prompt -> goal update/review/gate -> goal closeout -> symphony next --goal latest, not the v8 scan/do/review/verify/status/continue/artifacts action list.
Do not infer task approval or release readiness from file names, branch names, commit messages, or frontend heuristics; worker self-approval remains disallowed.

tasks.title: Allowlisted verification runner
acceptance: 用户能在 Workbench 里执行主线验证，而不是切终端。
Workbench reads and runs only the allowed verification commands from the runbook or plan, including pnpm check, pnpm test, pnpm workbench:build, and git diff --check.
This is not a generic shell runner or a new safety framework; the product purpose is to reduce manual main verification steps.
The runner does not make v8 scan/do/review/verify/status/continue/artifacts the top-level Workbench action model.

tasks.title: Main verification evidence writer
acceptance: 用户不用手写验收证据。
Workbench generates a main verification evidence draft or file that records command results, main commit, merge mode, task id, and goal id.
Evidence writing supports the Product spine from reviewer approval through verification commands to main-verification gate registration.
Evidence generation does not claim reviewer approved, main verified, release ready, auto-merge, or auto-tag unless the explicit registered event exists.

tasks.title: Main verification gate registration
acceptance: 验证完成后 goal 状态能从 Workbench 推进。
Workbench reuses the v21/v23 flow to call symphony goal gate --gate main-verification --status passed|failed.
Main verification gate registration requires reviewer approval first and records explicit goal gate evidence.
Release readiness remains blocked until all task main-verification gates pass and release closeout gates are recorded.

tasks.title: Main verification tests/docs
acceptance: 把 task close loop 变成 Workbench 能力。
Tests and docs cover blocking before approved, verification failure, evidence writing, gate dry-run/confirm, and status refresh.
Release closeout verifies pnpm check, pnpm test, pnpm workbench:build, pnpm test:mutation:gate, pnpm audit --audit-level high, git diff --check, and goal closeout before release.ready.
Release evidence records the v24 Main Verification Workbench boundary: the Workbench main path is based on the latest goal/runbook flow, not a v8 action dashboard.
copyOnlyCommands: pnpm --silent symphony goal gate --goal v24-main-verification-workbench --gate release.ready --status declared --verifier codex-v24-release-manager --evidence-ref docs/plans/v24-release-evidence-2026-05-29.md --dry-run --json
